task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into OpenClinica and selected the correct study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard is visible, and the active study shown in the UI (usually near the top navigation bar) is 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' or 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully imported the XML data file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating that data was imported, or an import summary screen showing that the file '/home/ga/import_data.xml' was successfully processed.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the subject matrix or record for DM-101.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject Matrix or View Subject page is open, explicitly showing the Subject ID 'DM-101'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct CRF for the target event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Demographics Survey' CRF is open or being viewed, and the UI indicates it is associated with the 'Baseline Assessment' event for subject DM-101.

task_completion.description: Verify the CRF correctly displays the imported patient data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Demographics Survey form shows the following values populated: Age: 56, Weight: 82.5, Height: 168, Smoking Status: Former, Diabetes Years: 8.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenClinica web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the OpenClinica GUI, rather than terminal commands (like curl or psql) bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the data is viewed within the actual OpenClinica application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The verified data is displayed inside the OpenClinica CRF web form, not just in a text editor viewing the XML file or a terminal output.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, and the page styling looks like the standard OpenClinica interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Study: Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Target Subject: DM-101. Target Event: Baseline Assessment. Target CRF: Demographics Survey. Import File: /home/ga/import_data.xml. Expected Data Values in CRF: Age = 56, Weight = 82.5, Height = 168, Smoking Status = Former, Diabetes Years = 8.
